chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 617 & 618 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection 25 and 28 2. For order on CMA No.2855 /2024 (exemption) 3. For hearing of Main Case 4. For order on CMA No.2856 /2024 (stay) 29.01.2026 Mr. Manzar Hussain, advocate for applicant These matters are pending since 2024 without any progress, even notice has not been sought/issued till date. Diary sheet demonstrates that on each occasion, the applicant has taken no effort to get the matter listed. On 23.01.2026, the following order was passed:- “Matter is pending for two years without any progress. Even today learned counsel remains unable to reformulate any question of law. At his request, adjourned to 29.01.2026 for reformulating questions of law”. Even today learned counsel remains unable to demonstrate and / or articulate any question of law arising out of the impugned judgment meriting in reference jurisdiction. Accordingly, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected matter. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ashraf
